items.title: Loved doing this Bulls mock offseason with cap genius @yossigozlan.bsky.social. We turned over half the roster, traded up from No. 15, traded Patrick Williams for the funniest return possible, and landed all my favorite free agents. Consider this pod free advice for my guy Bryson
items.author: Ricky O'Donnell
items.body_excerpt: Loved doing this Bulls mock offseason with cap genius @yossigozlan.bsky.social. We turned over half the roster, traded up from No. 15, traded Patrick Williams for the funniest return possible, and landed all my favorite free agents. Consider this pod free advice for my guy Bryson Graham.

items.title: Bulls fans have to prepare for more Patrick Williams going forward
